description:
The iptables-nft package can be installed with the following command: 
$ sudo dnf install iptables-nft
rationale:
<tt>iptables-nft</tt> controls the Linux kernel network packet filtering
code. <tt>iptables-nft</tt> allows system operators to set up firewalls and IP
masquerading, etc.
ocil_clause: the iptables-nft package is not installed
ocil:
Run the following command to determine if the iptables-nft package is installed: 
$ rpm -q iptables-nft
title: Install iptables-nft Package
